media_path: 02 Building Environments - The Basics\09 Creating The Ceiling Blueprint and Finishing Our Environment.mp4

items.text: 现在，让我们使用蓝图来获取我们的立方体角色，并为其创建多个实例，然后在整个天花板上创建一个立方体网格。 So now let's use a blueprint to take our cube actor and create many instances of it and create a grid of cubes across our entire ceiling. 好了，我要清除蓝图中的所有内容，并删除建筑脚本中的所有内容，确保我们的事件图也是空的。酷毙了 Alright, so I'm going to clear everything out of our blueprints and we'll delete everything in the construction script to make sure our event graph is also empty. Cool. 就像我之前说的，我们可以添加任何静态网格，而静态网格只是我们场景中任何单个网格的名称。 So like I was saying before, we can just add any static mesh and a static mesh is just the name for any individual mesh in our scene. 因此，在这种情况下，我们将把这个天花板瓦片称为下划线静态网格。 So in this case we'll call this ceiling tile underscore static mesh. 我们刚刚引入了一个静态网格，所以现在必须将它定义为我们想要的静态网格。 We just brought in a static mesh so now we have to define it as the static mesh that we want. 现在我们可以点击场景中的这个立方体，如果点击蓝图下方的浏览图标，就会选中这个立方体，然后点击使用选中的网格。 So now we can click this cube in our scene and if we click the browse icon underneath our blueprint here it's selected the cube and now we can click use selected mesh. 我们将对素材做同样的处理。点击浏览该素材，然后点击使用该素材。酷毙了 And we'll do the same thing with the material. Hit browse to that material and hit use that material. Cool. 现在，如果我们看一下视口，就会看到我们的静态网格。如果我们对其进行编译，现在这里就有了第二个网格，非常棒。 And now if we look at our viewport we have our static mesh. If we compile it we now have a second mesh over here which is great. 让我们把它带入我们的施工脚本中。 And let's bring this into our construction script. 现在我们有了一个静态网格，但如果我们想实例化多个静态网格，只需输入实例即可，而无需使用静态网格。 So now we have our one static mesh here but if we want to instance many static meshes all we have to do is instead of using a static mesh we can just type in instance. 我们可以看到有一个实例化静态网格选项，我将其称为天花板瓷砖实例。 And we can see that there's an instanced static mesh option and I'll call this ceiling tile instance. 而它是作为演员的子角色进入的。我们不想这样，但又想保留默认场景根。 And it came in as a child to that actor. We don't want that but we do want to keep this default scene root. 所以，如果我把这个拖到默认场景根目录的顶部，它会问我们是想把它变成我们的新根目录（我们不想这么做），还是想把它作为子目录附在默认场景根目录之下。 So if I bring this and drag it on top of default scene root it'll ask us do we want to make it our new root which we don't want to do or do we want to attach it as a child underneath it. 所以我们要把它附加上去。现在我们的新实例还没有分配静态网格，所以我们做同样的事情，给它分配相同的静态网格和相同的材质。 So we're going to attach it. And now our new instance we don't have a static mesh assigned so let's do the same thing and assign it the same static mesh and the same material. 现在我们可以删除原来的静态网格，因为我们不再需要它了，但我们必须对实例静态网格做一些特殊处理，才能让它们显示在我们的蓝图中。 So now we can delete our original static mesh because we don't need it anymore but there is something specific that we have to do with instance static meshes to make them show up in our blueprint. 我现在就教你怎么做。 And I'm going to show you how to do that right now. 因此，我们在构造脚本中需要做的具体工作是输入添加实例。 So the specific thing that we need to do in our construction script we need to type in add instance. 因此，我们需要创建一个新的静态网格实例。 So we need to create a new instance of that static mesh. 因此，我输入 add instance（添加实例），如果我们编译它，就会出现错误，这是因为我们没有为这个实例进行转换。 So I'll type in add instance and if we compile it we get an error and it's because we don't have a transform for this instance. 但是，如果我们使用我们的天花板瓦片实例，让我们来获取变换，那么我们只需抓取该数据。 But if we take our ceiling tile instance and let's get the transform so we just want to grab that data. 现在又有了这么多选项，因为它基本上提供了你可以从这个实例中获取的所有数据。 Now again there are so many options because it's basically giving you every piece of data you can possibly grab from this instance. 因此，在这种情况下，我们要查找的只是相对变换。 So it can be confusing at first in this case all we want to look for is get relative transform. 通常情况下，你会寻找相对变换或世界变换，但在这种情况下，我们需要相对变换。 Typically you're going to look for the relative transform or the world transform but in this case we want relative. 然后将其插入到变换中，当我们点击编译时，我们就在场景中的构造图中创建了一个新实例。 And let's just plug that into the transform there and when we hit compile now we've actually created a new instance in our scene in the construction graph. 但下一个问题是，现在我们已经添加了一个实例，如何才能添加一个实例网格呢？ But the next question is now we've added one instance how can we add a grid of instances. 要做到这一点，我们必须连续添加多个数据，而一个好的方法就是创建一个循环，本例中就是一个 for 循环。 So to do that we're going to have to add several in a row and a good way to do that is by creating a loop in this case a for loop. 因此，我们只输入 for 循环，而不是 for each 循环。 So let's just type in for loop not for each loop. 因此，理解 for 循环最简单的方法就是，我们在执行构造脚本时，将其固定在执行器上。 So the easiest way to understand a for loop is we have this execution pin the construction script is executing. 只要你有一个 for 循环，它就会根据这些索引，一遍又一遍地继续执行这个循环体。 And as soon as you have a for loop it's going to continue executing this loop body over and over and over again based on these indexes here. 因此，在第一个索引和最后一个索引之间。 So between the first index and the last index. 因此，如果我将其设置为 1，那么每次运行构造脚本时，它都会重复执行 10 次。 So if I set this to one it's going to execute this 10 times over and over and over again every single time that construction script is run. 所以一开始什么也做不了，因为我在说，嘿，让我们来获取相对变换，但变换是在同一个位置上的。 So this doesn't do anything at first because I'm saying hey let's get the relative transform but that transform is in the same exact spot. 所以，我所做的就是在同一个位置上增加了 10 个立方体。 So all I've done is I've added 10 cubes in the same exact spot. 所以看起来没什么不同，但如果每次运行循环时，我们都能说 "嘿，再移动一个立方体的长度"，会怎么样呢？ So it doesn't look any different but what if every time we run that loop we could say hey move one more cube length away. 执行循环后，再增加一个立方体的长度，再增加一个立方体的长度，再增加一个立方体的长度，直到达到设定的立方体数量。 And after we execute that loop add another cube length and another cube length and another cube length until we've hit a set number of cubes. 所以，我们可以这样做。 So here's how we can do that. 因此，我们要改变设置转换的方式。 So we're going to change how we set up this transform. 因此，我要做的一件事就是点击右键，输入 "转换"。 So one thing I'm going to do I'm actually going to right click and type in make transform. 如果你看看我们这里的所有数据类型，就会发现我们可以制作任何这些数据类型。 If you look at all these data types that we have here we can make any of these. 举例来说，矢量就像我们在材料图中看到的那样，只是将三个浮点变量合并成了一个数据，也就是我们现在所说的 "矢量"。 So vectors for example like we saw in the material graph are just three float variables jammed into one piece of data now known as a vector. 因此，如果我右键点击这里，输入 "制作矢量"，就会看到 OK，我们将有三个单独的浮点，这就构成了一个矢量。 So if I right click down here and type in make vector we'll see OK we would have three individual floats and that makes a vector. 你可以看到，这个位置是一个矢量，比例也是一个矢量。 And you can see that this location is a vector and so is scale. 因此，如果你有一个位置、一个旋转和一个缩放，那么现在就已经形成了一个转换数据。 So if you have a location a rotation and a scale that has now made a transform piece of data. 因此，我们要做的就是获取数据，并以虚幻能够理解的方式将其输入到虚幻中。 So again all that we're trying to do is we're trying to take data and feed it into Unreal in a way that it'll understand. 这可能需要一点时间来适应，因为这确实是我们在学习这种编程语言，尤其是如果你是编程新手，这是第一次学习这种语言。 And this can take a little bit of time to get used to because this is really us learning that programming language and it is a language for the first time if you're new to programming especially. 如果您将鼠标悬停在这些针脚上，您就可以看到它希望提供或接收的数据类型。 And the way that Unreal tries to help us with that is if you hover over any of these pins you can see the type of data that it's expecting to give or receive. 因此，在这种情况下，它会给出一个变换数据，我们知道这是因为我们输入了 make transform。 So in this case it will give a transform data and we know that because we typed in make transform. 但如果我们看一下这里的位置，它就会说："嘿，我们需要一个缩放矢量，我们需要一个矢量和旋转矢量，它需要一个也是矢量的旋转器。 But if we look here at the location it's saying hey we want a vector at scale we want a vector and rotation it wants a rotator which is also a vector. 我们可以直接在 make rotator 中输入这个值，但它只是一个用于旋转的特定值。 We can just type that in make rotator but it's just a specific value used for rotation. 好了，我们把这些插头都拔掉吧。 All right so let's unplug all of these. 我们有了 "制造转换"，让我们把它插入 "世界转换"。 We have our make transform let's plug this into our world transform. 我们有了天花板瓷砖。 And we have our ceiling tile. 因此，我们可以做的一件事就是输入 "获取本地边界"，找出这个单位有多大。 So one thing we can do to find out how big this is in units we can type in get local bounds. 因此，这将抓取边界框或所占空间的大小。 So this will grab the bounding box or the amount of space that this takes up. 而我要做的，就是在这里用一个单一的矢量给出真正的边界框。 And what I'm going to do this is going to give us the true bounding box in a single vector here. 现在我们有了立方体的长度，每次运行 for 循环时，我们都想在上一个立方体离开的地方再放一个立方体。 So now we have the cube length and now every time we run a for loop we want to place another cube exactly where that last cube left off. 因此，每循环一次，我们都要增加一个立方体，再增加一个立方体，再增加一个立方体。 And so each loop we want to add another cube another cube and another cube. 因此，在 for 循环过程中，我们从循环中得到的一个数据就是当前的索引。 So during a for loop one piece of data that we get out of that loop is what index are we currently on. 因此，我们第一次拿到它时就会运行它。 So we run it for the first time we get one. 我们第二次运行时得到了两个。 We run it for the second time we get two. 我们第三次运行，得到三个。 We run it for the third time we get three. 因此，我们可以这样做，然后乘以我们的边界框，就可以说，嘿，它需要距离一个立方体的长度。 So we can do that and multiply that by our bounding box to say hey it needs to be one cube length away. 这个需要两个立方体的距离。 This one needs to be two cube lengths away. 这需要三个立方体的距离。 This needs to be three cube lengths away. 因此，我打算用它乘以我们的本地边界。 So I'm going to take this I'm just going to multiply it by our local bounds. 现在，我们要把它与我们的位置联系起来。 And now we're going to tie that in to our location. 而现在，我们希望它从零开始，运行 10 个循环，最后点击编译。 And now we'd expect it to start at zero run 10 loops to get to the end and hit compile. 现在我们来看看这个场景中的方块。 And now we look at this now we have a bunch of cubes in our scene. 但他们在往上走，往右边走。 But they're going up and to the right. 因此，这是一个很好的开始，至少我们可以将所有这些立方体实例化。 So this is a great start where at least getting somewhere we're instancing all these cubes. 但是，为什么不是长长的一排，而是向右边这个方向延伸呢？ But why is it going up into the right in this direction instead of a long single row. 这是因为我们在虚幻中发送和接收的数据不匹配。 Well it's because we have a mismatch in the data that we're sending and receiving in Unreal. 这里发生了什么？ So what's happening here. 我们要把这个地方约束起来。 We're getting this local bounds. 但如果你看看这个，它是黄色的，不是绿色的。 But if you look at this it's a yellow color it's not green. 绿色是一个浮动值。 Green is a float value. 黄色是一个向量，表示 X Y 和 Z。 Yellow is a vector meaning X Y and Z. 因此，我们的转换数据和位置数据是 X、Y 和 Z。 So our transform data our location data here is an X Y and Z. 因此，现在的情况是，我们得到了 X、Y 和 Z 的边界。 So what's happening here is we're getting the bounds in X Y and Z. 我们将其乘以该整数，因此得到了这些副本。 We're multiplying it by that integer which is why we're getting these copies. 但我们正在增加 X、Y 和 Z 的转换数据。 But we're increasing our transform data in X and Y and Z. 因此，我们每次都要加上 X Y 和 Z，这就是为什么它在这条对角线上。 So we're adding X Y and Z every time which is why it's in this diagonal. 如果你仔细想想，这其实是完全说得通的。 Which actually makes perfect sense if you think about it. 因此，我们绝对不希望它被 Z 升高。 So we definitely don't want it going up in Z. 因此，如果我们要移除这里的大头针，只需点击控制键即可。 So if we remove the pin here and to do that you just control click. 您只需点击控制按钮，就能拔掉针脚。 You just control click that pin off so that you can remove it. 因此，只要有矢量，右键单击此处的引脚，就可以输入 split struct pin（分割结构引脚）。 So whenever you have vectors if you right click the pin here you can type split struct pin. 这将把我们的向量分割成三个浮点数值。 And this will split our vector into three float values. 现在我们把 X Y 和 Z 分开了。 And now we have X Y and Z separated. 因此，我们可以将 Z 保持为零，因为我们永远不想改变 Z。 So we can keep Z at zero because we never want to change Z. 目前，我们可以将 Y 设置为零。 For now we can keep Y set to zero. 但是，我们还需要确保这个边界在 X Y Z 中被分割开来。 But we also need to make sure that this bounds is split in X Y Z. 因此，我们来拆分这个结构针。 So let's split this struct pin. 现在，我们的乘法仍将使用矢量模式。 Now our multiply is still going to be in vector mode. 因此，我们可以通过右键单击要更改的针脚来进行更改。 So we can change this by right clicking the pin we want to change. 我们可以将其改为浮点数。 We can just change this to a float. 现在，如果我们看一下我们的立方体，就会发现 X 边界可以将它向右移动。 And now if we look at our cube we can see that the X bounds is the one that will move it to the right here. 因此，让我们用 X 乘以整数。 So let's grab the X multiply that by the integer. 将其改为浮点数，并将位置 X 设置为该值。 Change this to a float and set our location X to that value. 现在让我们看看编译时会发生什么。 And now let's see what happens when we compile. 这就是我们的甜蜜。 And sweet there we go. 现在，我们有了一排完美的立方体，它们将存在于我们的场景中。 Now we have a perfect row of cubes that will exist in our scene. 我们可以看到，地面上的贴花给我们带来了很好的反光效果。 We can see that we get that nice reflection off of them from our decal on the ground. 现在，我们就可以在天花板上创造出我们想要的那一排完美的网格了。 And now we're on our way to create that perfect row of grids that we were looking for from our ceiling here. 那我们继续吧。 So let's keep going. 刚才我谈到了添加变量的问题。 Earlier I talked about adding in variables. 因此，我们有组件，而组件就是行动者。 So we have components which components are actors. 但我们也可以使用纯数据变量。 But we can also use variables that are just pure data. 它们与演员或我们在场景中放置的东西无关。 They're not associated to an actor or something that we're placing in our scene. 我们要修改的只是数据本身。 It's just data itself that we're going to modify. 因此，我们应该制作行和列。 So we should make a rows and we should make a columns. 因此，如果我们将行改为整数而不是浮点数，就会得到一个整数，因为我们不可能真正拥有一行的一半。 So if we change row to integer instead of float that will give us a whole number because we can't really have half of a row. 我们需要整数。 We want whole numbers. 如果我们点击左侧的这些小眼睛图标，我们的行和列就会显示在蓝图的详细信息面板中。 And if we click these little eye icons to the left here then our rows and columns will show up inside of the details panel of our blueprint. 所以我之前就在看这个。 So I was looking at this earlier. 它将横跨 20 个立方体。 It's going to be 20 cubes across. 因此，如果我们有这里的行，如果我们向下滚动，我们可以将默认值设置为 20。 So if we have our rows here if we scroll down we can set the default value to 20. 因此，我们将其设置为 20，然后将列数设置为 40，因为我们希望其长度是距离的两倍。 So we'll set that to 20 and then we'll set the columns to 40 because we want that to be twice as long into the distance. 现在，我们可以把这些行拖进来。 And now what we can do with our rows is we can drag this in. 我们只是再次获取该行的数据 get 或 sets。 We're just getting that row data again get or sets. 在这种情况下，我们要获取该数据的引用。 In this case we want to get the reference to that data. 我们将其设置为最后一个索引。 We'll set that to the last index. 现在，当我们点击编译时，时间应该更长，我们将有 20 行立方体，看起来很酷。 And now when we hit compile this should be longer and we'll have 20 rows of cubes which is looking cool. 同样，如果我们拖动它，它就会动态地改变一行中有多少个立方体。 And again like if we drag this around this will dynamically change how many cubes are in a row. 每次我们通过移动或更改行或列数据来修改这个角色时，它都会再次运行构造脚本。 And every time we're modifying this actor either by moving it or changing the row or column data it is running that construction script again. 所以它是自动发生的。 So it happens automatically. 你不必真的去想它。 You don't have to really think about it. 现在，为了让天花板更合适，我要把它移到他的头顶上方，并在这里相交。 And now to just make this a proper ceiling I'm just going to move this up above his head and kind of intersecting here. 现在，我们只需再做一列，让它延伸到远处。 So now we just have to make another row of columns so it goes out into the distance. 因此，最简单的方法就是使用非常相似的想法和技术制作另一个 for 循环。 So the easiest way to do that is to make another for loop using very similar ideas and techniques. 我们还要更进一步。 And we're just going to take it one step further. 所以，我要复制并粘贴这个。 So I'm going to just copy and paste this. 让我们再做一个 for 循环，在这种情况下，最后一个索引不是使用行，而是添加列。 Let's make another for loop in this case the last index instead of using the rows I'm going to add the columns. 因此，让我们获取列的引用，并将其设置在此处，然后将循环主体设置为添加实例。 So let's get the reference to our columns and we'll set that there and we'll set the loop body to add instance. 同样，如果我们看看我们的小工具，小工具从来不说谎。 Again if we look at our gizmo the gizmo never lies. 现在我们要添加 Now we want to add. 绿色的有点难看，但可以看出是红色的。 It's a little hard to tell that it's green but we can tell that one's red. 所以这个是绿色的。 So this one's green. 我们要添加 Y 轴。 We want to add in the Y axis. 所以，想法是一样的。 So same idea. 我们只是要采取这种乘法。 We're just going to take this multiply. 我们将有我们的 Y 界。 We're going to have our Y bounds. 我们要获取 for 循环列的索引，然后将其插入位置 Y。 We're going to take the index of our columns for loop and we're going to plug that into the location Y. 现在，如果我们按下 "编译 "键，就会生成一个巨大的立方体网格。 And now if we press compile now we just made a huge grid of cubes. 所以，我要把这个旋转一下，让它就位。 So I'm going to rotate this around and get this into place. 现在你们可以看到，我们的蝙蝠洞已经组装完毕。 And now as you can see we have our bat cave fully assembled. 因此，它符合我们的参考标准，而且看起来非常漂亮。 So it's matching our reference and it's looking pretty sweet. 所以，如果你仔细观察这个人，就会立刻发现他身后有一团奇怪的黑色阴影。 So the one thing that you'll notice immediately if you look close to this guy is he has this odd black shadow clouding behind him. 这是因为现在我们使用这些发射材料创建了整个盒子，我们的场景完全由流明照明。 And this is because now that we've created this entire box using these emissive materials our scene is lit entirely with lumen. 老实说，这是你不想做的事情。 And honestly this is something that you don't want to do. 您不希望使用流明来驱动场景内的所有照明，因为这会产生一些伪影。 You don't want to use lumen to drive all of the lighting inside of your scene because there is some artifacting. 流明为场景增添了不错的 GI 反弹效果。 Lumen adds a nice GI bounce into your scene. 作为辅助照明很好，但作为关键光源或场景中的所有光源就不好了。 It's nice as supplementary lighting but it's not good as the key light or the source of all the lighting in your scene. 原因很多，但最主要的是它是基于屏幕空间的。 For many reasons but the main one is that it's based off of screen space. 这意味着，如果我快速移动相机，边缘就会出现伪影。 Which means if I move my camera really quickly it will start to get artifacting around the edges. 如果你看这里，边缘开始变得很暗，但当我开始看它时，它会变得更亮。 And if you look over here the edge starts to get really dark but as I start to look at it it will get brighter. 因此，为了避免出现这种情况，你应该开始在场景中使用一些矩形灯光，因为这些灯光的大小和形状与我们的顶部网格相同。 So in order to avoid this you would want to start to use some rectangle lights in your scene because these mimic the same size and shape of these top grids that we have. 遗憾的是，整个场景都用流明照明并不能完全解决所有问题。 Unfortunately just because this entire scene is lit with lumen it's not going to completely fix everything. 但你可以看到，我们在后面这里看到的由流明伪影造成的孔洞，可以通过在后面这里放置灯光来解决。 But you can see that the holes that we have in the back here that are caused by lumen artifacting can be solved by placing lights back here.
